items.title: Apple MacBook Air & Pro with M5, the New MacBook Neo Just Announced, Find All Information at B&H
items.description: B&H is pleased to share a slew of exciting new products from Apple, including the latest iterations of the and MacBook AirMacBook Pro (now featuring Apple's powerful M5 silicon), the updated Studio Display, as well as the all-new MacBook Neo.

items.title: WSJ Columnist's First Impressions of Apple's New iPhone 17e and MacBook Neo
items.description: WSJ's Nicole Nguyen breaks down the pros and cons of Apple's new iPhone 17e and the Macbook Neo, and how they compare to previous models.

items.title: Apple unveils lower cost iPhone 17e, raises prices on MacBooks
items.description: The price increases for the company's laptops come amid a global memory shortage dubbed "RAMageddon" that is being fueled by the rise in demand for artificial intelligence.

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.description: Find insight on Apple, CoreWeave and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

items.title: Broadcom CEO Hock Tan sees AI chip revenue 'significantly' above $100 billion next year
items.description: Broadcom reported that AI revenue more than doubled in the latest quarter and is projecting continued growth as demand soars.
